---
title: "Pathway quantification in the NSCLC2 cohort"
subtitle: "Inflammation according to smoking status, TMB and TPS"
author: "Jane Merlevède"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%m/%d/%y')`"
output:
  bookdown::html_document2:
    self_contained: true
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
      smooth_scroll: true 
    toc_depth: 4
    number_sections: true         
    df_print: paged       
    keep_md: true
    verbose: true
    #delete_merged_file: false
---


```{r load_r_packages, include=FALSE}
library(pheatmap)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(decoupleR)
library(progeny)
library(OmnipathR)
```


```{r user_defined_parameters, include=FALSE}
cohort = "NSCLC2"
cancer_type = "lung"
method_pathway = c( "mlm", "ulm", "wsum", "wmean", "aucell", "ora", "viper", "gsva")
```


```{r read_inputs_data, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE}
#modify the path to the clinical data
clinical_data <- read.csv(file="../../../../data/clinical_data/20241115_NSCLC2_for_R_update_2024.csv")
clinical_data$immucan_id <- gsub("LUNG-", "", clinical_data$immucan_id)

clinical_data_all_traits <- read.csv(file="../../../../data/clinical_data/all_traits.csv")
clinical_data_all_traits$immucan_id <- gsub("LUNG-", "", clinical_data_all_traits$immucan_id)

NSCLC2 = read.delim("inputs/NSCLC2_combatseq_24220_genes_normalized_counts_N=124_2023-10-07.csv", sep=",", row.names=1)
tempx <- unlist(str_split(colnames(NSCLC2),".F")) 
colnames(NSCLC2) <- tempx[seq(1,length(tempx),2)]
colnames(NSCLC2) <- gsub("\\.", "-", colnames(NSCLC2))
```


```{r define_input_output_folders, echo=FALSE, eval=TRUE}
inputDir <- "inputs/"
outputDir="outputs/"
GraphOutDir <- "outputs_graphs"
outputDirInflammation="Inflammation_quantification/"
outputDirPathwayActivity="pathwayActivity/"

if (!file.exists(inputDir)){
  dir.create(inputDir)
}

if (!file.exists(outputDir)){
  dir.create(outputDir)
  dir.create(file.path(outputDir, outputDirPathwayActivity))
}

if (!file.exists(GraphOutDir)){
  dir.create(GraphOutDir)
  dir.create(file.path(GraphOutDir, outputDirPathwayActivity))
  dir.create(file.path(GraphOutDir, outputDirInflammation))
}
```


<br><br>
**The aim of this analysis is to look at the quantification of inflammation in the `r cohort` IMMUcan cohort according to different groups of patients based on smoking, TMB and TPS status. We looked at 3 pathways defined in PROGENy (Schubert M. et al, 2018): NFKB, JAK-STAT and MAPK.**
<br><br>



# Perform quantification

## Methods
We use the decoupleR approach (Badia-i-Mompel P. et al, 2022), an ensemble of computational methods to infer biological activities from omics data. decoupleR extracts biological signatures from prior knowledge within a unified framework. It incorporates methods that take into account the sign and weight of network interactions.

![decoupleR toolbox: decoupleR's workflow, it contains a collection of computational methods that coupled with prior knowledge resources estimates biological activities from omics data molecular readouts such as normalized counts or log fold changes. (Badia-i-Mompel P. et al, 2022)](inputs/decoupleR.jpeg)

The inputs of decoupleR are: 

- a matrix containing molecular feature values, either for single samples or from population comparisons, like normalized gene expression counts per sample or log fold changes

- a prior knowledge resource such as a collection of gene sets. 

The user can then choose any method alone or many simultaneously. The recommended methods based on the benchmark performed in the decoupleR paper are ulm, mlm and concensus.


## Prepare clinical data for annotation 
```{r prepare_clinical_data, echo=FALSE}
source ("code/prepare_clinical_data.R")
```

## Pathway activity quantification  {.tabset .tabset-dropdown}
```{r pathway_activity_inference, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE, eval=TRUE}
net_progeny <- decoupleR::get_progeny(organism = "human", top = 100)
source ("code/pathway_activity_inference.R")
```


# Test inflammation across groups of patients

```{r read_quantif_matrices, echo=FALSE}
list_files <- list.files(paste0(outputDir, outputDirPathwayActivity), pattern = "PathwayActivity_NSCLC2_*", full.names = TRUE)
# order the quantifications with first the recommended methods (mlm, ulm)
list_files <- list_files[c(3, 5, 1:2, 4, 6:8)]
```

## Compare inflammation quantification according to smoking status
```{r, child = "code/inflammation_and_smoking_status.Rmd", eval=TRUE}
```

## Compare inflammation quantification according to TMB
```{r, child = "code/inflammation_and_TMB.Rmd", eval=TRUE}
```

## Compare inflammation quantification according to TPS
```{r, child = "code/inflammation_and_TPS.Rmd", eval=TRUE}
```


# Session info
```{r, eval=TRUE}
sessionInfo()
```
